{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321141447184D12F7737003B4E748"}"},"total":3373},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7333091527697367832","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好好看，不错。但是节奏有点慢。但是我觉得快了又不好，觉得还是觉得作者的把握还是可以的。在如今的快节奏生活下，这种写法还是蛮有新意的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707370673,"group_id":"7205961018810305595","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"漫长的岁月中我已与无数人相遇，还将和无数人相逢，但愿与你相逢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5iw6G5UqvG4s5UpKFJqS60=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/30f49abf07e142a099bafb066a3f9599~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618366&x-signature=Q4kpXwt8aQB8wiLMSgnkpMaWq70%3D","user_id":"55153074209","user_name":"风云荡漾"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"55153074209","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7205961018810305595","book_info":{"abstract":"【小荒年+农家+兵灾+囤物资+兑换商城+架空历史+日常+求生】
（古代版末日求生）
徐长寿竟然穿越成了一个六岁的农家子，恰逢荒年，家徒四壁。
一大家子的吃饭问题如何解决？
且看我有兑换商城：
【糙米，两文一斤，每日限购三斤。】
【育肥五花肉，十文一斤，每日限购两斤。】
【九品武者，吕布，一万两白银，限购一次，忠诚度100%。】
在这个百姓举步维艰，连填饱肚子都难的时代，徐长寿靠着兑换商城带着一家吃香喝辣。
本来打算就此做个富家翁，但是这个年景，覆巢之下，焉有完卵。
蛮人入侵，百姓流离失所，纷纷逃难。
国朝乱象四起，徐长寿打算与这世道斗一斗！
给自己，给家人挣一个安身的世外桃源。
（非正史，非地球，请勿代入任何朝代）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/01a0487caf288ae20db835d335ffcc3b","author":"灯芯道人","author_id":"","book_id":"7205961018810305595","book_name":"兵灾逼我逃难？我能召唤绝世猛将","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7205961179359871545","read_count":"42678","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1011386"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"521","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,乡村,系统,穿越,求生,架空,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1edae5b268b6986caff810dccef90a36~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257687&x-signature=m8TqmSes3EQhcIl0%2FC6jfdI4dvA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1319863128176655","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"17"},"log_ex 7"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321141447184D12F7737003B4E748"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":38,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15508,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":55967},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1680338094,"author_reply_time":1680338091,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598213351140197182","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文章前一半写的非常好，非常引人注胜，人物刻画的也都很细节。创作立体也很新颖。后半部分较前半部分就稍有不足，描写人物都比较扁平。一些常见的人物很久都不会出场。比如柳小姐，黎王等等等等前期比较常见的人物。
不过总的来说，还是挺好看的。看到结尾的时候，作者说中间断更了一年，所以也是有原因的。总之还是挺推荐的。好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769101220,"group_id":"7205961018810305595","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"帅哥","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8tiKdm5zN0/D0ML6wlT3pN5qdRmPiQG8g+MXCsUrmG4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d97ef52329af418ebdd749c0d3fd8d78~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623142&x-signature=i6F4bgNA2%2FuTSzLs6cD9c%2B3vEWE%3D","user_id":"4080985905313325","user_name":"林荫道的金森羽片"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4080985905313325","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7205961018810305595","book_info":{"abstract":"【小荒年+农家+兵灾+囤物资+兑换商城+架空历史+日常+求生】
